name: Asia-London Range Breakout XAUUSD M5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, price breaking the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) high/low with a strong body during the London window (07:00-10:00 UTC) continues for at least 1R, provided the Asia range is neither too tight nor too wide (ATR-normalized). Outside this window or with degenerate ranges, the edge vanishes.

entry_rules.long: close > asia_range.high + 0.5*atr14 AND bar_body >= 1.2*atr14 AND only_first_breakout_per_day
entry_rules.short: close < asia_range.low  - 0.5*atr14 AND bar_body >= 1.2*atr14 AND only_first_breakout_per_day

exit_rules.sl: 1.2 * atr14 from entry (opposite side of broken level, whichever is further)
exit_rules.time_stop: close at end of London window (10:00 UTC) or after 24 M5 bars, whichever first

notes: Pivot away from generic MA/RSI rules that failed in gen40. Signal is time-gated and volatility-normalized; regime filter explicitly rejects all-day trading.
